message:
Add 15 browser-context loser-drain correctness tests (umelq.6.2)

Verify race/join loser drain invariant under browser-like single-threaded
scheduling via LabRuntime. Tests cover region quiescence, deterministic
drain ordering, oracle integration, join severity lattice, SporkAppHarness
lifecycle, and edge cases (mid-computation drain, mixed completion).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
